creator: ino-qc@spotteswoode.de.eu.org
text:
i wrote:

> to get SMBus working i needed the patch from kern/108830 (hint, hint).
> as this chipset only needs a few PCI-IDs added here and there, people
> won't need to do any patching in the (near?) future, me hopes.

as it turns out, this patch also contains the neccessary changes to the
nve(4) driver needed for the operation of the onboard-gigabit LAN.

I would like to urgently recommend revising kern/108830.  the 'net has
more patches, mostly regarding missing PCI-IDs, but this is the one
i used.  recent sources let some hunks of it fail, though, because
somebody committed something which overlaps.


regards, clemens
